description: Parameters for mapping raw proxies to normalized T, K, C indices [0,1]. All indices computed as weighted sum of min-max normalized proxies.

T_normalization.description: Technological level: energy throughput + trade complexity + urbanization + R&D intensity

energy_per_capita_GJ.description: Total energy consumption per capita (GJ/year). Min = hunter-gatherer (~2), Max = modern high-income (~300)

trade_volume_index.description: Trade volume relative to civilization peak

urbanization_rate.description: Fraction of population in urban settlements

high_tech_export_share.description: Share of high-tech in manufactured exports

K_normalization.description: Intraspecific economic cannibalism: concentration + regressivity + rent dominance + state capture + financialization + external burden export

top_1_percent_income_share.description: Share of pre-tax income accruing to top 1%

top_10_percent_wealth_share.description: Share of total private wealth held by top 10%

tax_regressivity_index.description: Effective tax rate ratio bottom 50% / top 1%. 0 = progressive, 1 = extremely regressive

rent_sector_dominance.description: Fraction of elite wealth from land rent / resource extraction / monopoly platforms vs trade/industry/innovation

state_capture_index.description: Degree to which elites control state institutions for private benefit

financialization_index.description: Financial sector profits / total corporate profits; financial assets / GDP

external_debt_burden_export_index.description: Degree to which civilization successfully exports its debt/inflation burden to other civilizations via currency hegemony, forced revaluations, or reserve status

C_normalization.description: Cooperative potential: public goods + trust + mobility + human capital investment

public_infrastructure_share.description: Share of state spending on public goods (infrastructure, science, commons) vs elite consumption / military / palaces

generalized_trust_proxy.description: Fraction of population expressing generalized trust in strangers / institutions

social_mobility_index.description: Intergenerational income elasticity inverted; probability of rising from bottom to top quartile

education_spending_pct_gdp.description: Public education spending as % of GDP

healthcare_spending_pct_gdp.description: Public + private healthcare spending as % of GDP. Note: US high spending with poor outcomes = inefficiency, not high C

union_density.description: Fraction of workforce unionized; proxy for collective bargaining / labor power
